title: Rescue Riker
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Rescue Riker''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Following a warning from [[Ordnance and Supply/Legends|Ordnance and Supply Command]] about a shortage of [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]], ''Rescue Riker'' was dispatched under escort from [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] to capture the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Ars Opus]]'' which had broken down in the [[Rudrig system/Legends|Rudrig system]] with a cargo of [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droids]].

Though the rescue effort came under attack from [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] were able to hold off the pirates while the crew of the ''Rescue Riker'' boarded and captured the freighter. More R-22s from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] arrived to escort the newly captured freighter and the pirates were unable to get close enough to prevent its escape.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
